evidence.snippet:
Brave 55A 4-in-1 Electronic Speed Controller (ESC)
--------------------------------------------------
Built in the USA, the Brave 55A is Blue UAS Certified. This 32-bit AM32 ESC boasts solder-free connections, current sensing and support for 3-8S input (10-35V), 55A continuous current (75A burst) and full DSHOT compatibility up to DSHOT1200. Experience the reliability, performance and mission-ready durability all in a single 30×30 package.

Full Line Of Drone Motors – All Built In The USA
------------------------------------------------
Engineered for high-efficiency and durability across a wide range of mission requirements, Unusual Machines motors feature high-temperature windings and premium EZO bearings, delivering smooth, reliable thrust for both speed & torque applications. No matter the challenge, you can count on Unusual Machines for all your professional-grade propulsion needs.

items.notes: Full line of drone motors built in USA

evidence.snippet:
Fat Shark HDO+ Headset
----------------------
Built in the USA, the HDO+ delivers industry-leading situational awareness via dual 1920×1080 OLED displays and a wide 50° field of view. A built-in DVR, onboard ventilation, and a flexible 7–25V power input guarantee it’s always mission-ready. Engineered for performance and reliability, the HDO+ sets the standard for professional-grade.

items.notes: Fat Shark HDO+ FPV video goggles/headset

evidence.snippet: ### **High-Performance, Fully NDAA Compliant Drone Components**

Built around the Sony 1/2.8” STARVIS 2 CMOS sensor, the NDAA compliant Aura delivers improved low-light performance, enhanced dynamic range, and highly detailed analog video for demanding mission applications. With 1500 TVL resolution, a 150° field of view, switchable 16:9/4:3 aspect ratios, and a flexible 5–25V input range, Aura ensures crisp, high-contrast image capture in the most challenging environments.

Blue UAS approved and NDAA compliant, this high-performance 5.8GHz analog VTX is built for professional applications. Delivering up to 1W output power with selectable 25–1000mW levels, Raceband 1–8 channels, and Tramp protocol control for precise tuning. Designed with a durable M2 20×20 mounting pattern, wide 7–36V input, and MMCX antenna connection, all in a lightweight 13g package.

ndaa.notes: Products page header claims 'Fully NDAA Compliant Drone Components'. Individual products (Aura FPV Camera, Aura VTX) also explicitly claim NDAA compliance.

Built in the USA, the Brave 55A is Blue UAS Certified. This 32-bit AM32 ESC boasts solder-free connections, current sensing and support for 3-8S input (10-35V), 55A continuous current (75A burst) and full DSHOT compatibility up to DSHOT1200. Experience the reliability, performance and mission-ready durability all in a single 30×30 package.

tagline: USA-built supplier of drone propulsion motors, flight controllers, electronic speed controllers, FPV cameras, video transmitters, and pilot headsets. NDAA-compliant and Blue UAS certified on select products (Aura VTX, Aura camera, Brave ESC). Publicly traded (NYSE: UMAC). Limited disclosure on motor NDAA status and full product certification roadmap.
